text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 

245 
VBP_ADJSTMT_AMT 
LABEL: 
Hospital Value Based Purchasing (VBP) Amount 
DESCRIPTION: This field represents the amount (rounded to whole dollars) of the Hospital Value Based Purchasing 
(VBP) Amount. This could be an additional payment on the claim or a reduction, depending on the 
hospital's score. 
SHORT NAME: VBP_ADJSTMT_AMT 
LONG NAME: VBP_ADJSTMT_AMT 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
8 
SOURCE: 
NCH
